method: Present-day analog candidates are generated by grounded_model.py at 2026 for the fixed ranking_cities catalog. The client computes nearest-neighbor climate distance over standardized monthly temperature and log monthly precipitation vectors.
source: WorldClim v2.1 observed baseline where available + raw CMIP6 ScenarioMIP temperature/precipitation, with IPCC AR6 calibrated temperature reported alongside by grounded_model.py

baseline_source.observed_citation: Fick, S.E. and Hijmans, R.J. (2017), International Journal of Climatology
baseline_source.delta_reference_period: CMIP6 deltas are relative to 1995-2014; baseline-period difference is disclosed, not hidden
